title: Pack N Trade Tall White Cake Box 14 Inch with 13mm Round Silver Drum – Durable 14×14×14″ Cake Box & Drum Combo – Ideal for Birthday & Wedding Cakes, Cake Decorators & Home Bakers
features: 【CAKE BOX WITH DRUM COMBO】This 14 × 14 × 14 inch cake box with drum is made from premium food-grade cardboard, ensuring safe transport and elegant presentation. It includes a 13 mm round silver cake drum for added stability and support.
【PROTECTIVE DRUM BASE】Comes with an 14‑inch diameter, 13 mm thick silver foil‑wrapped drum—grease‑proof and moisture resistant—providing a strong and elegant foundation for cakes.
【ELEGANT SILVER DESIGN】Featuring embossed silver foil on the drum adds a professional, eye-catching touch that enhances the presentation of any celebration cake—from birthdays to weddings.
【EASY ASSEMBLY】Both box and drum are quick and simple to assemble; box folds flat for storage and opens effortlessly, saving time for busy bakers and decorators.
【VERSATILE USE】Perfect for transporting, displaying, or gifting cakes of all types—ideal for cake drum use, bakery events, home celebrations, and cake decorators alike.
description: Pack N Trade’s Tall White Cake Box 14 Inch (14 × 14 × 14″) in combo with a 13 mm round drum board is the ideal solution for safe, hygienic transport and professional presentation of your decorated cakes. This package includes a robust square cake box made from thick white cardboard and a food‑grade round cake drum board measuring 13 mm thick—engineered to provide maximum stability for tiered or high‑stacked cakes. The thick silver round cake drum grease‑proof, providing a sturdy, moisture‑resistant foundation that supports even larger celebration cakes with ease. The cake box assembles in seconds—just pop up the sides and snap the lid in place—making it user‑friendly for busy bakers or caterers who need quick packaging. With a pristine white exterior and windowless design, this box ensures your creations look polished and untouched while protecting cake decorations or topper elements. Whether you’re shipping cupcakes, pastries, birthday cakes, mini‑wedding tiers, or celebratory desserts, this combo offers both elegance and reliability. Bakeries, cake artists, home cooks, and event planners will appreciate the blend of presentation quality and transport protection this Pack N Trade set delivers.

specifications_table.Product care instructions: ‎Hand wash only. Wipe with a damp or dry cloth for cleaning. Not suitable for dishwasher, microwave, oven, or freezer.
